meaning: condominium 分户出售公寓大厦
examples: He started paring down his material life, selling off his condo in New York, his mansion in Florida and his only car.
A condo on the beach in Florida.
But condo have fallen even further, down about 25%.
This year, the massive new CityCenter development of hotels, condo towers and stores drew the top toques.
So Mom can use the 5% for a luxury cruise, then tap the principal for condo maintenance.
